title: 2Pcs Golden Shell Hair Clips, Gold Hair Clips Set with Large and Small Sizes, Fashionable Hair Accessories for Women and Girls, Suitable for Daily Use, Parties, Weddings and Beach Vacations
features: 【Package Includes】2Pcs Golden Shell Hair Clips, one large and one small, designed to meet various styling needs; The gold hair clips set offers versatility for different hair types and occasions
【Size Details】Large golden shell hair clip measures 9.5*6.3*4.5CM; Small gold hair clip measures 6*4*3CM; Both sizes provide secure hold for thick or thin hair
【Durable Material】Made from high-quality plastic, these golden shell hair clips are lightweight yet sturdy; The gold hair accessories maintain their shape and color with regular use
【Stylish Design】Gold claw clip features an elegant shell shape, adding a touch of sophistication to any hairstyle; The gold clips for hair complement both casual and formal outfits

【Multi-Purpose Use】Gold hair clip set is suitable for daily activities, makeup sessions, workouts, and special events like weddings; Perfect for creating quick updos or securing hair while washing face
